Package org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.healthinsurance

Class PlanRecord

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.healthinsurance.PlanRecord
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PlanRecord extends Object implements Serializable
A class that manages a person's record of plan uses and expenses for an enrollment period.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • PlanRecord

      public PlanRecord(long time, InsurancePlan plan, long nextEnrollmentPeriod)
      Create a new Plan with the given Payer.
      Parameters:
      time - The time the plan starts.
      plan - The plan associated with the PlanRecord.
      nextEnrollmentPeriod - The time of the next enrollment period.

  • Method Details

    • payMonthlyPremiums

      public BigDecimal payMonthlyPremiums(double employerLevel, int income)
      Pay monthly premiums associated with this plan.
      Parameters:
      employerLevel - The employer contribution level.
      income - The income of the person.
      Returns:
      Cost of the premiums.

    • updateStopTime

      public void updateStopTime(long updatedStopTime)
      Update the stop time of the plan record.

      updatedStopTime - The new stop time.

    • getPlan

      public InsurancePlan getPlan()
      Get the primary insurance plan associated with the record.
      Returns:
      The primary insurance plan.

    • determinePlanOwnership

      public void determinePlanOwnership(long time, Person person, PlanRecord prevRecord)
      Determines and returns what the ownership of the person's insurance at this age.
      Parameters:
      time - The age at which to determine ownership.
      person - The person whose insurance ownership is being determined.
      prevRecord - The previous insurance record for comparison.

    • getStartTime

      public long getStartTime()
      Get the start time of the plan record.
      Returns:
      The start time.

      Get the stop time of the plan record.
      Returns:
      The stop time.

      secondaryPlan - The secondary insurance plan to set.

      Get the secondary insurance plan associated with the record.
